task_description: Create /pages/mpds.html - complete MPDS (Manulife Perlindungan Diri Syariah) product page with color-coded keywords, question-style content, premium table, and error-free premium calculator following the design patterns of existing pages like mdla.html

verification.summary: File created at 958 lines. 47 keyword color-code instances (.kw-blue/.kw-gold/.kw-green). 4 structural elements (site-header, site-footer, main.js, style.css). All 6 calculator test cases pass (including kecelakaan cap scenario). Premium table matches provided lookup data.
